theorem: continuum edge residual local window layer

nth_bit_summary.open_step_O2prime: Implement mckay_thompson_coefficient_parity(g, k) for g in {2A, 3A}. This gives correction(t,x) in O(log N) without the grid. Combined with Lucas base, gives full O(log N) Rule 30 center bit extractor. Transport: Conway-Norton (1979) McKay-Thompson series + O2' axes/sheets.
